page_content:
Prerequisite: BSCI160 or BSCI337; or (PLSC110 and PLSC111) or (PLSC112 and PLSC113).

BSOS - Behavioral and Social Sciences

BSOS438 Special Topics in Study Abroad IV (1-6 Credits) Special topics course taken as part of an approved study abroad program.

Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs.

BSOS448 Teaching Assistant Practicum (1-6 Credits) Supervised practicum for teaching assistants for BSOS/UNIV courses. Repeatable to: 9 credits.
